# Proposal for Meadow Lane Dental

### 1. Opening

You told me twice that what keeps you up at night is the gap — "paying £30 a click, then when they don't book immediately, we just let them go." Twenty-five missed calls a week, one-in-three enquiries converting, no follow-up. This proposal is built around closing those three gaps. Nothing else.

### 2. Their situation

- Spending ~£2,400/month on Google and Meta ads, generating ~80 enquiries/month, only 32% of which book a consultation
- Approximately 25 calls per week missed — confirmed via your phone log review
- Zero follow-up for prospects who don't book on the first call
- Practice blog dormant for two years; no consistent content production
- Last year's £18k total marketing spend produced no measurable attributable revenue

### 3. Our approach

Three layered fixes, deployed in sequence: first we plug the missed-call hole so Laura stops losing 25 enquiries a week — an always-on receptionist agent that answers every inbound call, books consultations directly into your calendar, and escalates anything clinical to the team. Second, we build the follow-up engine: every unconverted enquiry enters a 21-day nurture sequence in your voice, not ours — so a prospect who hesitated at £30-per-click doesn't quietly disappear a week later. Third, the content engine: monthly long-form pieces written on your practice's voice, repurposed into social and email, so the blog stops being the empty room.

All three fixes sit on top of your existing ad spend rather than replacing it — we're making the spend work harder, not adding more channels.

### 4. Scope

#### Starter — £1,200/month + £3,500 setup
- Voice Receptionist agent (24/7 inbound, books into your practice management system)
- Missed-call recovery (SMS + call-back within 5 minutes for any call Laura misses in-hours)
- Monthly 1-hour review call
- **Excludes:** content production, follow-up nurture, custom reporting

#### Growth — £1,800/month + £7,500 setup  *(recommended)*
- Everything in Starter, plus:
- Follow-Up Pilot: automated 21-day nurture sequence for unconverted enquiries, in your voice
- Content Creator: one long-form blog post per month, trained on your voice, repurposed into 4 social posts and 1 email
- Monthly reporting pack: bookings attributable to each channel, missed-call recovery rate, content engagement
- Weekly 30-minute tactical call for the first 8 weeks, then monthly

#### Scale — £3,000/month + £15,000 setup
- Everything in Growth, plus:
- Ad management included (we manage Google + Meta directly, optimising against booked consultations, not clicks)
- SEO programme: 4 content pieces per month, technical SEO audit, local rankings monitoring
- Quarterly strategy session with the whole team
- **Excludes:** paid media budget (ad spend is separate)

### 5. Timeline

| Milestone | Week | Deliverable |
|---|---|---|
| Kickoff | Week 0 | Signed agreement, kickoff call, access to your phone system, CRM, and website |
| Missed-call fix live | Week 2 | Voice Receptionist answering 100% of in-hours calls; after-hours handoff configured |
| First follow-up sequence live | Week 3 | 21-day nurture running for every unconverted enquiry |
| First content piece published | Week 5 | Long-form blog + 4 social posts + 1 email |
| First monthly report | Week 6 | Baseline-to-current numbers on bookings, missed-call recovery, content engagement |
| Pre-summer review | Week 10 | Full funnel review before August quiet period |

### 6. Investment

**Starter** — £1,200/month + £3,500 one-off setup (ex. VAT). Setup billed on signature; monthly retainer billed on the 1st, rolling monthly with 30 days' notice.
*Includes:* voice receptionist + missed-call recovery only.
*Does not include:* content production or follow-up nurture.

**Growth** — £1,800/month + £7,500 one-off setup (ex. VAT). *Recommended based on the three gaps we discussed.*
*Includes:* all Starter features plus follow-up automation, content production, monthly reporting.
*Does not include:* ad management or SEO.

**Scale** — £3,000/month + £15,000 one-off setup (ex. VAT).
*Includes:* everything in Growth plus ad management and SEO programme.
*Does not include:* ad spend itself (that remains with your budget).

### 7. Next step

Sign the Growth tier by Friday, April 25. We start Monday, April 28. Missed-call fix live by May 11. Follow-up engine live by May 18. First content piece published May 25. Everything operational before your August quiet period begins.

If you want to discuss scope before signing, two 30-minute slots this week: [Calendly link A] | [Calendly link B].

### 8. About us

Acme Agency has worked with UK private dental practices for the last four years. We don't do one-size-fits-all — every engagement starts with your phone logs, your CRM, and your patient reviews, because that's where the real picture lives.

**Relevant case study — Crescent Dental, Edinburgh (the case study you mentioned seeing):** a 4-chair practice in a similar demographic to yours, 58% private when we started (now 82%). In the first 90 days: missed-call recovery rate went from 0% to 71%, enquiry-to-consultation conversion moved from 28% to 54%, and monthly new-patient revenue increased from £24k baseline to £38k attributable. They're on the Growth tier — same one recommended here.
